message:
fix(abi): refine poll/select strict-mode semantics and extract real errno

Restructure validation logic for poll(), ppoll(), select(), pselect():

- In strict mode, invalid nfds now returns EINVAL immediately instead
  of being silently healed (matches POSIX expectation)
- In hardened mode, nfds continues to be clamped as before
- Fix error path to extract actual errno from the underlying syscall
  instead of hardcoding EINVAL, ensuring callers see the real reason
  for failure

Clarifies the strict/hardened behavioral contract and improves error
diagnostic fidelity for poll/select family calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
